prestazioni: Engine: M30B30V (3.0L inline-6, 200 HP stock) with a custom-built 3.2L stroker kit using Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 CR), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from JE Pistons for 350+ HP on 98 RON fuel with a Schrick 284° camshaft profile and ported/polished cylinder head by VAC Motorsports.

Forced induction: Single-turbo setup using a Garrett GT3582R (0.82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3.5" stainless steel exhaust manifold by Supersprint, paired with a Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate and a custom intercooler core from Bell Intercoolers (4.5" thick, 22" x 12" core) with CNC-machined aluminum end tanks.

Drivetrain: Getrag 265 5-speed dogleg transmission with a 2.93:1 final drive ratio, reinforced with a Quaife ATB differential (80% lock) and a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (240mm) with a lightweight aluminum flywheel. Custom half-shafts by GTS Driveline with CV joints rated for 500+ HP.
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using the BMW E9 3.0 CSL Homage kit by Liberty Walk (LB-WORKS), including custom front fenders with integrated cooling ducts for the intercooler, rear overfenders with a 2.5" stretch, and a custom carbon fiber rear diffuser by Vorsteiner.

Aero: Custom front splitter by 991 Motorsport (3D-scanned for perfect fitment) with integrated canards, paired with a GT3-style rear wing by RW Carbon (adjustable angle, 1.8m width) and a custom aluminum undertray with vortex generators for downforce optimization.

Wheels: BBS LM-R (9x18 ET15 front, 11x18 ET0 rear) with custom center locks, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/35/18 front, 295/30/18 rear). Custom wheel spacers by H&R (15mm front, 25mm rear) for aggressive flush fitment.
